channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Australian Open: Iga Swiatek is in total control during a 6-1, 6-0 rout of Emma Raducanu
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Everything came so easily for Iga Swiatek during a 6-1, 6-0 victory over Emma Raducanu on Saturday in the only Australian Open women's third-round match between two past Grand Slam champions — if you thought that meant it would be close, you'd have been rather wrong — tha
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Penguins' Nedeljkovic makes NHL history as he becomes 1st goalie with goal and assist in a game
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Alex Nedeljkovic remembers admiring the way Marty Turco and Martin Brodeur handled the puck during his childhood. On Friday night, he accomplished something neither of them — or any other goalie — had ever done.
item.dc:creator: JOE YERDON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says he intends to sign with Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says in an Instagram post he intends to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nedeljkovic becomes 1st goalie with goal and assist, and has 40 saves as Penguins beat Sabres 5-2
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Alex Nedeljkovic became the first goalie in NHL history to have a goal and an assist, and made 40 saves as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Buffalo Sabres 5-2 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE YERDON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eastern Michigan basketball under investigation for suspicious betting activity vs. CMU, per ESPN
item.description: Betting integrity firms are scrutinizing the Eastern Michigan University men’s basketball team after sportsbooks reported unusual betting during their game against Central Michigan University.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Hi, Mom! 20-year-old Californian Alex Michelsen beats a second top-20 seed at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Alex Michelson joked that he was too busy at the Australian Open on Saturday morning to have a lengthy phone conversation with his mother back home in California.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Charley Hoffman, Rico Hoey charge into the lead midway through The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — Charley Hoffman knows his time on the PGA Tour is running short. He can feel every one of his 48 years whenever his troublesome back acts up, and he knows the recent reduction in tour cards will end most players’ careers well before they reach his age.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox exec calls Brady rumors "a never-ending, merry-go-round" of narratives
item.description: Even as Tom Brady goes through his first postseason and prepares to call his first Super Bowl as a television analyst in three weeks, rumors about his future continue to be rampant, much to the dismay of Fox Sports.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Notre Dame prepares for powerful Ohio State defense in national championship game
item.description: SOUTH BEND, Ind. (AP) — Quarterback Riley Leonard and the Notre Dame offense have faced a fierce gauntlet of defenses in their path to the College Football Playoff title game. The Fighting Irish battled their way through Penn State (No. 7 in total defense), Georgia (No. 30) and Indiana (No. 2).
item.dc:creator: CURT RALLO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Was Oregon’s Rose Bowl performance just a one-off debacle? Former coaches assess what went wrong and what’s next
item.description: We asked three former coaches who know the Ducks well whether major changes are needed to win the CFP, or if tweaks will suffice for Dan Lanning and Co.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Boys Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 63, La Costa Canyon 61
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI- Fantastic hoops game on Wednesday night with Rancho Buena Vista edging La Costa Canyon 63-61.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Department of Education releases memo on student-athlete NIL pay, Title IX compliance
item.description: The Department of Education's Office of Civil Rights released a fact sheet on Thursday clarifying the rules of NIL payments and Title IX compliance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies six-game winning streak ends at UNLV, 65-62
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State basketball team suffered just its second loss of the season Wednesday night, falling at UNLV, 65-62. Tucker Anderson led the Aggies with 19 points, but the Aggies missed its last six shots of the game, and dropped to 16-2 on the season. Dedan Thomas Jr.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC trades Jaedyn Shaw to the North Carolina Courage
item.description: Midfielder Jaedyn Shaw has been traded by the San Diego Wave FC to the North Carolina Courage, the football club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: NFL playoffs: Matchups, history and what to know for Divisional Round weekend
item.description: As the Bears' search for a new head coach intensifies — and seemingly now includes every candidate out there (see our Coaching Tracker) — there are still eight teams left in the NFL playoffs. Obviously, this is where the Bears hope their new coach will take them one day, and beyond.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: The Athletic's Dianna Russini provides a look inside the Bears search for their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have requested interviews with 19 candidates for their next head coach, including Mike McCarthy, Thomas Brown, Ron Rivera, Ben Johnson, Todd Monken, and Steve Sarkisian, while the ambiguity around Ryan Poles' contract situation may make it more difficult for the Bears to hire their
item.dc:creator: Jarrett Payton, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs sign former Brewers starting pitcher to one-year deal
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have signed former Milwaukee Brewers starting pitcher Colin Rea to a new contract for the 2025 MLB season, while the Cubs have designated RHP Michael Arias for assignment to make room for Rea on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mike McCarthy not returning as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy is not returning as head coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Oregon Ducks 2024 receiver arrested as fugitive
item.description: Ryan Tristan Chance Taylor -- who played under the name Ryan Pellum -- allegedly used a 9mm pistol to assault someone on December 25 in Long Beach, California.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, NewsNation

item.title: Clippers, Lakers to resume their wildfire-delayed schedules on Monday
item.description: NBA games are scheduled to return to wildfire-ravaged Los Angeles on Monday night, with the Clippers planning to resume their schedule when they host the Miami Heat and the Lakers set to host Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears will interview Ron Rivera for head coaching position; team says it has interviewed Lions coordinators
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears will reportedly consider a man tied to both of their Super Bowl appearances to try to lead them back there one day. The Chicago Tribune reports the Bears are expected to interview Ron Rivera on Sunday, according to NFL sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Devin Booker scores 34 in Suns' 114-106 win over Jazz
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored 34 points and the Phoenix Suns never trailed in a 114-106 victory over the Utah Jazz on Saturday. Booker had 22 points in the first half on 7-of-8 shooting, including 4 of 5 from 3-point range. He finished 12 for 20 overall and 6 for 12 from behind the arc.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NBA postpones Rockets vs. Hawks game because of winter storm
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The game between the Houston Rockets and Atlanta Hawks scheduled for Saturday has been postponed because of a winter storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation
